parameters.description: Conceptual references for nutrient-dependent bacterial growth modeling and curve fitting used in Growth-01.

parameters.value: windowed exponential fit informed by Monod-style nutrient dependence and Zwietering growth-curve analysis

citations.title: The Growth of Bacterial Cultures
citations.tier_justification: Canonical, heavily cited growth-model review establishing nutrient-dependent bacterial growth as the conceptual basis for this task.

citations.authors: Zwietering MH, Jongenburger I, Rombouts FM, van 't Riet K
citations.title: Modeling of the bacterial growth curve
citations.tier_justification: Foundational, highly cited bacterial growth-curve modeling paper explicitly called out in the LabCraft plan for Growth-01.

parameters.description: Representative doubling time for laboratory E. coli in rich LB medium at 37 C.

citations.title: Growth and Maintenance of Escherichia coli Laboratory Strains
citations.tier_justification: Peer-reviewed laboratory methods review stating that E. coli can double every ~20 minutes in rich medium under optimal conditions.

parameters.description: Representative doubling time for laboratory E. coli in glucose minimal medium.

citations.title: Cell size and growth rate are major determinants of E. coli mRNA abundance
citations.tier_justification: Peer-reviewed study reporting a doubling time of about 57 minutes for E. coli in glucose minimal medium.

parameters.description: Relative exponential growth-rate fraction for E. coli in LB supplemented with 1.8 uM chloramphenicol.

citations.title: Chloramphenicol affects Escherichia coli growth rates and bacterial membrane composition
citations.tier_justification: Peer-reviewed study reporting that 1.8 uM chloramphenicol reduces the specific growth rate of E. coli by roughly 50 percent.

parameters.description: Starting OD600 for each growth-condition inoculation in Growth-01.

citations.title: RqcH supports survival in the absence of non-stop ribosome rescue factors
citations.tier_justification: Peer-reviewed E. coli growth-curve protocol using a starting OD600 of 0.05 with repeated plate-reader measurements.

parameters.description: Measurement interval for Growth-01 OD600 readings.

citations.title: RqcH supports survival in the absence of non-stop ribosome rescue factors
citations.tier_justification: Peer-reviewed E. coli growth-curve protocol collecting OD600 measurements every 15 minutes.

parameters.description: Lower fraction of the maximum observed OD600 retained for windowed exponential-growth fitting.

citations.title: The E. coli molecular phenotype under different growth conditions
citations.tier_justification: Peer-reviewed E. coli growth study fitting doubling times using OD600 points between 0.05 and 0.75 times the maximum observed OD600.

parameters.description: Upper fraction of the maximum observed OD600 retained for windowed exponential-growth fitting.

citations.title: The E. coli molecular phenotype under different growth conditions
citations.tier_justification: Peer-reviewed E. coli growth study fitting doubling times using OD600 points between 0.05 and 0.75 times the maximum observed OD600.
